tags.label: INTRO
tags.reason: Section frames the research problem, states the gap in prior work, and introduces the study's aims.

tags.label: THEORY_LIT
tags.reason: References to prior research and theoretical background are present, but the main function is to set

tags.label: METHODS
tags.reason: Describes data collection, sample, and analytic procedures (topic modeling, use of R library) used

tags.label: RESULTS
tags.reason: Presents findings, tables, and observed patterns from the data analysis.

tags.label: RESULTS
tags.reason: Continues reporting findings and patterns from the data (tweets, themes, grievances).

tags.label: DISCUSSION
tags.reason: Some interpretive commentary on the meaning of the findings is present.

tags.label: DISCUSSION
tags.reason: Interprets findings, discusses implications, and connects to broader issues.

tags.label: CONCLUSION
tags.reason: Wraps up the paper, summarizes, and suggests future research directions.

tags.label: OTHER
tags.reason: Author contribution statement; not a standard research section.
